checks.name: html_syntax_and_required_markers
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: javascript_parse
checks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).join('\n'); new Function(scripts); console.log('JS_PARSE_PASSED');"

checks.name: manual_bulk_sync_static_check
checks.result: No new per-action executeGAS(payload...) call was added; candidate writes use pending schedule operations.

checks.name: dialog_static_check
checks.result: No alert(), confirm(), or prompt() usage was introduced.

checks.name: schema_static_check
checks.result: Spreadsheet headers and column order were not changed.
